nodes.name: workspace-runtime.ts
nodes.summary: Core service module managing workspace runtime lifecycle, including execution workspace provisioning and teardown, git worktree operations, runtime service startup/stop/reuse, and port allocation. This is the largest and most complex file in the server, orchestrating all workspace execution infrastructure.
nodes.languageNotes: No classes — 81 exported and internal functions covering the full execution workspace lifecycle, with heavy use of async/await and child process management.

nodes.name: realizeExecutionWorkspace
nodes.summary: Provisions and materializes a full execution workspace, including git worktree creation, dependency installation, and environment setup.

nodes.name: ensurePersistedExecutionWorkspaceAvailable
nodes.summary: Ensures a persisted execution workspace is ready, creating or resuming it from stored state with full integrity checks.

nodes.name: cleanupExecutionWorkspaceArtifacts
nodes.summary: Cleans up all artifacts from a completed execution workspace, removing git worktrees, temp files, and persisted state.

nodes.name: startLocalRuntimeService
nodes.summary: Launches a local runtime service process, configures its environment, waits for readiness, and registers it in the service registry.

nodes.name: ensureRuntimeServicesForRun
nodes.summary: Ensures all required runtime services are started and leased for a given run, handling reuse and adapter-managed service scenarios.

nodes.name: startRuntimeServicesForWorkspaceControl
nodes.summary: Starts runtime services in the context of workspace control operations, coordinating service launch and workspace readiness.

nodes.name: reconcilePersistedRuntimeServicesOnStartup
nodes.summary: Reconciles persisted runtime service records on server startup, marking stale services stopped and cleaning up orphaned state.

nodes.name: restartDesiredRuntimeServicesOnStartup
nodes.summary: Restarts runtime services configured with a desired-running state after server startup, restoring previous execution environment.

nodes.name: persistAdapterManagedRuntimeServices
nodes.summary: Persists adapter-managed runtime service records to the database, normalizing and storing service metadata and state.

nodes.name: recordGitOperation
nodes.summary: Records a git operation step within a workspace command sequence, capturing output and status for audit logging.

nodes.name: recordWorkspaceCommandOperation
nodes.summary: Records a workspace command execution step, capturing stdout/stderr output and exit status for structured reporting.

nodes.name: provisionExecutionWorktree
nodes.summary: Creates a new git worktree for an execution workspace, setting up the branch and directory structure.

nodes.name: resolveRuntimeServiceReuseIdentity
nodes.summary: Computes the reuse identity for a runtime service, determining whether an existing service can be reused for a new request.

nodes.name: startup-banner.ts
nodes.summary: Renders a formatted startup banner to the console when the Paperclip server initializes, displaying connection info, version, configuration status, and environment details.

nodes.name: printStartupBanner
nodes.summary: Prints a formatted startup banner with server URL, version, JWT secret status, and database connection info to the console.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel entry point for the storage module, exposing the storage service factory, singleton accessor, and public types for use throughout the server.

nodes.name: local-disk-provider.ts
nodes.summary: Implements a local filesystem storage provider for development and self-hosted deployments, supporting object put/get/list/delete operations mapped to a configured directory.

nodes.name: provider-registry.ts
nodes.summary: Registry factory that selects and instantiates the appropriate storage provider (S3 or local disk) based on runtime configuration.

nodes.name: s3-provider.ts
nodes.summary: Implements an AWS S3 storage provider supporting object put, get, list, and delete operations with configurable bucket and prefix.

nodes.name: service.ts
nodes.summary: Creates the storage service layer that wraps a storage provider with company-namespaced key management, content-hash-based deduplication, and file upload/download operations.

nodes.name: types.ts
nodes.summary: TypeScript type definitions for the storage module, declaring provider interfaces, service contracts, put/get/list/delete operation inputs and outputs.

nodes.name: telemetry.ts
nodes.summary: Initializes and exposes the PostHog telemetry client for server-side analytics event tracking, with a singleton accessor pattern.

nodes.name: express.d.ts
nodes.summary: TypeScript declaration file that augments the Express Request type with Paperclip-specific properties such as authenticated user context and company information.

nodes.name: ui-branding.ts
nodes.summary: Manages per-worktree UI branding customization, including favicon, title, theme color, and meta tag injection for white-labeling support in the server-rendered HTML.

nodes.name: version.ts
nodes.summary: Exports the server version string read from package.json, used throughout the server for version reporting.

nodes.name: vite-html-renderer.ts
nodes.summary: Creates a cached HTML renderer that integrates with Vite's dev server for SSR preamble injection or serves transformed production HTML with branding applied.

nodes.name: worktree-config.ts
nodes.summary: Manages worktree-level configuration and runtime port persistence, including legacy config migration, port allocation writing, and runtime config patching for per-worktree execution environments.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the server package, enabling strict mode and configuring module resolution for the Node.js server environment.

nodes.name: vitest.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vitest test runner configuration for the server package, specifying test file patterns and environment settings for unit tests.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Agent skill guide for diagnosing why a Paperclip agent or task has stopped progressing, covering 16 diagnostic patterns including blocked tasks, failed tool calls, and missing context.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide for converting high-level implementation plans into structured Paperclip tasks with proper dependencies and assignments.

nodes.name: agent-instruction-templates.md
nodes.summary: Reference templates for writing agent instruction prompts across 13 patterns including role definition, tool usage, communication style, and output formatting.

nodes.name: coder.md
nodes.summary: Reference definition for the Coder agent role, specifying its responsibilities, tool access patterns, and coding behavior guidelines.

nodes.name: qa.md
nodes.summary: Reference definition for the QA agent role, covering test strategy, bug reporting protocol, and quality gate responsibilities.

nodes.name: securityengineer.md
nodes.summary: Reference definition for the Security Engineer agent role, covering threat modeling, vulnerability assessment, and security review responsibilities.

nodes.name: uxdesigner.md
nodes.summary: Reference definition for the UX Designer agent role, covering user research, wireframing, accessibility guidelines, and design review responsibilities.

nodes.name: api-reference.md
nodes.summary: API reference documentation for Paperclip agent creation, covering 5 endpoint groups including agent configuration, task assignment, and communication APIs.

nodes.name: baseline-role-guide.md
nodes.summary: Baseline guide defining the foundational behaviors, communication protocols, and decision-making patterns expected of all Paperclip agents across 12 behavioral sections.
